title: YOUTH PROGRAMS - 211info
text: CITY OF PENDLETON RECREATION CENTER YOUTH PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides day camps, summer camps, and after-school care. 510 SW Dorion Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Most activities are for children in grades 1st-7th Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 966-8100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 966-8100 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships may be available. DOCUMENTS: Varies by program AREA SERVED: City of Pendleton SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CITY OF PENDELTON PARKS AND RECREATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
